# Ananya Rangaraju

> Software Developer & AI Systems Engineer · Ex-Oracle Health (Cerner) · Dartmouth MEM Graduate

## Profile

Software developer and AI systems engineer focused on applied AI, LLM observability, and agentic systems. Two years shipping production AI at Oracle Health (formerly Cerner), owning observability for clinical AI agents used across 100+ client deployments. Completed a Master of Engineering Management at Dartmouth College (2024-2026), where she learned the business and strategy side of building AI products. Based in Hanover, NH, open to relocate.

## Story

She builds AI products. She's shipped systems into production and built her own AI evaluation platform, Clearance, from scratch. Before Dartmouth, she spent two years at Oracle Health shipping production AI for clinical systems. What motivates her is building things that scale globally and solve real problems, things that hold up once real people are using them.

## Core Competencies

- **Stakeholder & Delivery:** Customer-facing technical communication, cross-functional implementation ownership, UAT, SLA monitoring
- **LLMs & Agentic Systems:** Agentic workflow design, LLM prompt engineering, tool-calling integrations, agent observability & debugging
- **RAG & Model Evaluation:** RAG pipeline architecture, multi-model benchmarking, reliability scoring
- **Full-Stack Development:** Next.js, FastAPI, TypeScript, Python, REST APIs, PostgreSQL
- **Data & Cloud Infrastructure:** SQL (CTEs, window functions), Pandas/NumPy/scikit-learn, AWS (Athena, Redshift, Glue, Lambda), Snowflake
- **Reporting & Analytics:** Power BI, Tableau, JIRA, rapid prototyping

## Tech Stack

- **AI/LLM:** Agentic workflows, prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, tool-calling integrations, multi-model benchmarking
- **Full-Stack:** Next.js, FastAPI, TypeScript, Python, REST APIs, PostgreSQL
- **Data & ML:** SQL, Pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn
- **Cloud & Infra:** AWS, Snowflake, Git, Kubernetes
- **Delivery:** Power BI, Tableau, JIRA, UAT, SLA monitoring
- **LLMOps:** Observability, evals, Langfuse

## Work Experience

### Oracle Health (formerly Cerner), Bangalore, India (2022-2024) — Software Developer
Owned observability and reliability for clinical AI agents deployed across enterprise client sites. Instrumented and monitored production AI agent behavior at scale, surfacing patterns that informed model improvements. Built data validation frameworks that caught quality issues before they reached the model layer. Designed reporting that brought AI performance, coverage, and compliance into one view for stakeholders. Acted as the technical bridge between AI product teams and the people using the tools day to day.

### Keany Produce and Gourmet, Landover, MD (2025) — Operations Intern
Applied predictive modeling and dashboarding to improve fulfillment and warehouse operations. Built predictive models to inform inventory and fulfillment decisions. Replaced manual weekly reporting with a live operational dashboard.

## Education

- **2024-2026** — Master of Engineering Management, Dartmouth College. Machine learning, business analytics, operations, strategy, finance.
- **2018-2022** — B.Tech, Computer Science & Engineering, Manipal University Jaipur. CGPA 3.9/4.0. Data structures & algorithms, database management, statistical analysis, computer networks.

## Projects

### Clearance (Autonomy Readiness Console)
AI agent evaluation platform that certifies whether LLM agents are reliable enough for unsupervised operation, benchmarking GPT-4o, GPT-4o mini, Claude Sonnet 4.5, and Gemini 2.5 Flash across simulated business workflows. Live evaluation pipeline making real per-trial LLM API calls with randomized edge-case injection, tracking per-trial latency and cost for cost-vs-reliability tradeoff analysis. Scoring system separating benchmark accuracy from real-world reliability, surfacing gaps as large as 61 points between the two. Automatic Cleared / Supervised / Not-Ready classification with configurable thresholds. Full reporting layer with dashboards, leaderboards, and expected-vs-actual failure breakdowns. Live app: https://flight-check-5.emergent.host

### Everpure Trust Passport (Technical Architecture Proposal)
Self-directed architecture proposal extending Everpure's Data Intelligence platform with a portable data-governance layer, the Trust Passport, that gates AI and RAG access to data by sensitivity, legal basis, and consent. Built by reading Everpure's own public healthcare and banking customer case studies and finding the gap: no automated way to separate regulated data from data safe for AI use. Modeled across two real regulatory regimes, HIPAA and GDPR/DORA, to prove the architecture generalizes. Benchmarked against named DSPM competitors (BigID, Varonis, Cyera, Securiti).

## What I'm Looking For

Open to roles in:
- AI Systems Engineer
- Applied AI Product Engineer
- Solutions Architect

## About This Site

This portfolio includes an AI chatbot (text and voice) built with Claude API, RAG over portfolio content (Supabase pgvector + OpenAI embeddings), and Langfuse observability. Stack: React 19, TypeScript, Vercel Edge Functions.
